name: btc-quant-dashboard
description: Bitcoin Event Contract Quantitative Signal System

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run copy-dist
scripts.build:client: cd client/btc-quant-client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.copy-dist: mkdir -p client/dist && cp -r client/btc-quant-client/dist/. client/dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
